title: Mediterranean Lamb Pilaf
description: A flavorful and aromatic pilaf dish made with lamb, richly spiced with Mediterranean herbs.
instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
Add onion and cook until softened, about 3 minutes.
Add garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add lamb and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Add rice, pilaf spice blend, salt, and pepper. Stir to combine.
Transfer mixture to a large saucepan and add 2 cups of water.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low, cover, and simmer for 20-25 minutes or until liquid has been absorbed and rice is tender.
Fluff pilaf with a fork and serve hot.
